problem id: 36300e18
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  00001101 -> 11010110
  11011010 -> 11001101
  10000010 -> 01100001
  11110010 -> 01011001
  10111110 -> 10111111
  00110001 -> 00001000
  10011100 -> 10001110
  00111000 -> 10011100

query: 01011011
predicted answer: 10011101
